event: response.created
data: {"type":"response.created","response":{"id":"resp_02","object":"response","created_at":1700000000,"status":"in_progress","model":"gpt-4o","output":[],"usage":null},"sequence_number":0}

event: response.in_progress
data: {"type":"response.in_progress","response":{"id":"resp_02","object":"response","created_at":1700000000,"status":"in_progress","output":[]},"sequence_number":1}

event: response.output_item.added
data: {"type":"response.output_item.added","output_index":0,"item":{"id":"fc_01","type":"function_call","status":"in_progress","name":"get_weather","call_id":"call_abc","arguments":""},"sequence_number":2}

data: {"type":"response.function_call_arguments.delta","item_id":"fc_01","output_index":0,"delta":"{\"location\"","sequence_number":3}

event: response.function_call_arguments.delta
data: {"type":"response.function_call_arguments.delta","item_id":"fc_01","output_index":0,"delta":": \"Tokyo\"}","sequence_number":4}

data: {"type":"response.function_call_arguments.done","item_id":"fc_01","output_index":0,"arguments":"{\"location\": \"Tokyo\"}","name":"get_weather","sequence_number":5}
